subject: physics
title: 19M.1.HL.TZ1.4
question_html:
A sports car is accelerated from 0 to 100 km per hour in 3 s. What is the acceleration of the car?

A. 0.1 g

B. 0.3 g

C. 0.9 g

D. 3 g
examiners_html: Response D was the most common (but incorrect) response, with candidates neglecting to convert km/h to m/s.
